title: Achievements
description: Unlock achievements by playing ZXSnake, reaching new milestones, and improving your high scores.
summary: Achievements reward your progress and encourage you to keep improving with every game of ZXSnake.

images.caption: Unlock new achievements as your skills improve.

sections.heading: Unlock New Achievements
paragraphs: ZXSnake includes Game Center achievements that reward regular play, high scores, and important gameplay milestones.
Whether you're chasing longer runs, higher scores, or simply enjoying another game, every achievement gives you another goal to work towards.

featureShowcases.heading: Every Game Counts
featureShowcases.summary: Achievements reward regular play and encourage you to keep improving with every game.
body: Every game of ZXSnake helps you move closer to your next achievement. As your skills improve, you'll unlock new milestones while climbing the leaderboards and earning BarkinMad Coins.
Achievements provide another reason to keep coming back, rewarding both casual play and long-term dedication.
bullets: Works alongside leaderboards and BarkinMad Coins.

image.caption: Every game brings you closer to your next achievement.
